positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_taller
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u55,axiom,
    ~in_class(windy)).

cnf(u43,axiom,
    ~taller(X0,michael) | taller(X0,X1) | michael = X1 | ~in_class(X1)).

cnf(u33,axiom,
    ~taller(X1,X2) | taller(X0,X2) | ~taller(X0,X1)).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    taller(michael,X0) | michael = X0 | ~in_class(X0)).

cnf(u32,axiom,
    man(michael)).

cnf(u42,axiom,
    ~taller(X0,peter) | taller(X0,michael)).

cnf(u35,axiom,
    man(peter)).

cnf(u34,axiom,
    taller(peter,michael)).

cnf(u69,axiom,
    can_block(peter,X0) | ~in_class(X0) | michael = X0 | ~man(X0)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    michael != windy).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    peter != windy).

cnf(u37,negated_conjecture,
    ~taller(X0,peter) | ~in_class(X0) | ~man(X0)).

cnf(u47,axiom,
    can_block(michael,X0) | ~man(X0) | michael = X0 | ~in_class(X0)).

cnf(u49,axiom,
    can_block(peter,michael)).

cnf(u36,axiom,
    ~can_block(michael,windy)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~taller(X0,X1) | can_block(X0,X1) | ~man(X1) | ~man(X0)).

cnf(u41,negated_conjecture,
    ~in_class(peter)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    michael != peter).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    in_class(michael)).

cnf(u66,axiom,
    ~taller(X1,peter) | ~in_class(X0) | taller(X1,X0) | michael = X0).

cnf(u61,axiom,
    taller(peter,X0) | michael = X0 | ~in_class(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define person(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define jump_when_shooting(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define great_shooter(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
